item.title: Have some bad life choices.
item.description:
Can't park there mate.
Can't park there either mate.
That's not a good spot either mate.
Mate....
I mean... At least he didn't park there.
The one time they CAN park there, they still fuck it up.
5/7 parking job.
If you had a nickel for every time you saw someone step in front of a bicycle and get run over, you'd have two nickels. Which isn’t much, but it’s weird that it happened twice
Good ol' Jacko "thunderballs" Brodie they call him.
You'd think that someone who's forklift certified would have more common sense. Nice parking job though.
Is this one of those self parking vehicles I keep hearing about?
Am I out of parking jokes? Yes. Yes I am.
Err.. Peter, is it going to be fine? Shouldn't this be done by a plumber? Look, here's the problem.
What in the final destination is this?

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Small ADHD dump for my fellow neurodivergent folks out there.
item.description:
As a person with ADHD and a Navy Sailor, this one appeals to me on both levels.
Yes, this is it. My mind wanders hundreds of miles a minute through a vaguely interconnected chain of thoughts. You ever go down a YouTube rabbit hole where you started out looking for a video on how to tie a necktie but now it’s two hours later and you find yourself in the weird section of YouTube? That’s pretty much my brain. It’s either hyperfocused on one thing and one thing only, or attempting to focus on everything that ever was, is, or will be.
I am typically at least two of these at all times.
I am an introvert, but only because I am terrible at communicating like a normal person. I either don’t think before speaking and blurt out something weird resulting in an awkward silence whereupon I back away slowly and never attempt to communicate with that person again out of sheer embarrassment… or I overthink what I’m going to say and never find the right time to speak up and the moment passes. But I want to be an extrovert so fucking badly. I want desperately to be part of the conversation and make people laugh (not awkwardly).
Yes, many believe this is where ADHD comes from. We are remnants of a bygone era. Adapted to survive in this modern world, but not excel in it.
Yeah man, sorry, that’s just me.
Bro when I tell you, I was trying to work on updating my security clearance package today at work, but the website design is so friggin janky. I got so stressed out I had to go for a walk and clear my head. I spent the next few hours with an stress-induced migraine and a sour mood. Over a fucking website. Come on me, it’s not that big of a deal. It’s a government website, you should already know it’s going to be poorly built.
I have a very nice blender that I bought to make smoothies with. I brought one to work for my breakfast for several months in a row, then never made them again. I do still use it for salsa though. I make some pretty good homemade salsa.
I really gotta work on my chief package, since that’s due in a few weeks. But on the other hand… Fallout 76 is running a new special event until Tuesday. ?
It must not be DISTRACTING background noise, is the problem. Music I know by heart and can sing along to on autopilot while I work on what I need to work on is perfect. Otherwise I WILL get distracted. Like, a lot.
Yep.
Thankfully I don’t skin pick and I’ve learned that they’re not mad at me, it’s just that I can be a lot sometimes and not everyone is always ready to deal with that when it’s convenient for me.
When you meet someone whose weird vibe matches your weird vibe.
I should honestly just have this printed as business cards and have them on standby to hand out.
My spirit animal, the noble trash panda, doing what I’ve been doing for the past few months. Things are going to hell and aside from here on Imgur, nobody seems to even want to acknowledge it, much less work on doing something about it.
And just because he won’t just stop fucking talking about it and it’s kinda stressing me out, I made this meme today.
item.dc:creator: morningxafter

H O N E Y
HAGGIS and ketchup

item.title: What Happened Today #105
item.description: ??️ The government that should protect you is being weaponized against you instead. While Trump offers donors VIP access to military parades featuring soldiers who get only one hot meal per day and will sleep on office floors, his administration revokes security clearances despite court orders, investigates critics, deports students over traffic tickets, and even pitches a dystopian reality show where migrants compete for citizenship. And those tariffs? Walmart says they will pass the cost on to us soon in the form of price increases. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email at the website GovBrief.today now. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/gaza-freedom-zone 2. https://go.govbrief.today/sort-of-deal 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-putin-only-peace 4. https://go.govbrief.today/un-slow-growth 5. https://go.govbrief.today/walmart-raise-prices 6. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-flouride-ban 7. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-accused-fraud 8. https://www.yahoo.com/news/tanks-cannons-soldiers-sleeping-dc-115133747.html 9. https://go.govbrief.today/military-dysphoria-screening 10. https://go.govbrief.today/va-mandatory-overtime 11. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-corruption-unit 12. https://go.govbrief.today/martin-ethics-probe 13. https://go.govbrief.today/baraka-fingerprinted-again 14. https://go.govbrief.today/dugan-pleads-not-guilty 15. https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-reality-show 16. https://go.govbrief.today/military-trespass-dismissed 17. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-rescinds-order 18. https://go.govbrief.today/states-secret-privilege 19. https://go.govbrief.today/comey-investigation-post 20. https://go.govbrief.today/law-firm-clearances 21. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-not-ready 22. https://go.govbrief.today/voa-fires-hundreds 23. https://go.govbrief.today/donors-parade-access 24. https://go.govbrief.today/denver-airport-outage 25. https://go.govbrief.today/student-wins-injunction Have a great Friday, Imgur. I'll catch up with you this weekend because we are late today!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: There were no sexually explicit books in libraries when I was growing up
item.description: And there are NONE today. They are banning sex ed and any literature that acknowledges different types of sexualities, deals with sexual assault and abuse.

item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: Fascists eat their young
item.description: From an interview with Tony Gilroy, discussing where the most competent Imperial characters end up at the end of Andor Season 2. "Fascism doesn't just take down the oppressed. It doesn't just come for the people it's trying to control. It inevitably destroys the people who've worked the hardest to build it. And that's been true all through history as well." I love the care and passion that went into making this show, including the allusions to revolutions in real-world history. Link to interview: https://youtube.com/clip/UgkxHuGfYBmMxZALpViL9XTy3hHHfYPyAVau

item.title: Look ma, I'm bilingual.
item.description: I have to start first off by saying I didn't have it the worst. I know there are horror stories much worse than mine, and I know this because I lost a friend who I witnessed get beat on by his mother and his stepfather (a pastor) for the most asinine things. He took his own life a few years back, and I can't help but think a part of it had to be the abuse he and his brother garnered, and with the lack of support and compassion by his parents when he hit the bottom he just gave up. It wasn't until I started therapy for my own SI that my therapist recognized in our meetings that I would say things and show signs of an abused person. Until then, I just thought that that was life and what everyone had to deal with. Even still, I'm hesitant to declare myself abused, as my parents never beat me. But they didn't have to. My mother specialized in emotional manipulation, and she had her other children to do the physical work. If you ask them, they would probably say they were trying to toughen me up or teach me their version of right. But the bruises they left and the brokenness I felt by the actions of my loved ones tell a different tale. So yeah, I for eternity feel like I'm walking on eggshells, I'm in stasis anticipating that next shoe to drop, I flench anytime someone is being dominant over me, and I cower everytime you start to raise your voice and I feel like the littlest person even if I've done nothing wrong. If you're being abused or you know someone who is, please seek help or help for them because not everyone survives. I miss you, Drew, and I'm so sorry I didn't do more to help you, I was too young and too dumb to understand how much that hardship could affect someone forever.
item.dc:creator: Discoball10
